name: Clinical safety note

labels: clinical-safety

\---



\## Safety Concern Summary



Describe the issue clearly.



\## Type of Concern



Select the closest type:



\- diagnostic overclaim

\- unsafe wording

\- unsupported medical interpretation

\- privacy concern

\- report-generation concern

\- misleading visual output

\- unclear limitation statement

\- other



\## Where the Concern Appears



\- app page or section:

\- report section:

\- file or module:

\- screenshot or example available:



\## Why It Is a Concern



Explain why this may be unsafe, misleading, or not appropriate.



\## Suggested Correction



Explain how the wording or behavior should be corrected.



\## Example Text



If relevant, provide safer replacement wording.



\## Additional Notes



Add any other relevant details.
